# Alaya

> Open-source corporate memory platform (Python, BSL 1.1) — extracts structured knowledge from work tools and serves it to AI agents via CLI, MCP, and REST API. Pre-implementation stage: documentation and CI scaffolding only, zero source code.

## Overview

- [README](./README.md): Project vision, architecture diagram, stack summary (39 LOC)
- [CLAUDE.md](./CLAUDE.md): AI assistant instructions — stack, architecture rules, code conventions, security policy (81 LOC)
- [CHANGELOG](./CHANGELOG.md): Version history, Keep a Changelog format (14 LOC)
- [CONTRIBUTING](./CONTRIBUTING.md): Contributor guide with dev setup, code style, PR workflow (52 LOC)
- [SECURITY](./SECURITY.md): Vulnerability reporting policy, planned security features (24 LOC)
- [LICENSE](./LICENSE): BSL 1.1 — converts to Apache 2.0 on 2029-04-07 (72 LOC)

## Project Status

No source code exists yet. The `packages/` directory referenced in CLAUDE.md and README.md has not been created. No `pyproject.toml`, `uv.lock`, or `docker-compose.yml` exists. All stack references (Python 3.13, FastAPI, SQLAlchemy 2.0, Pydantic, PostgreSQL + pgvector, Redis, TaskIQ, Anthropic SDK, Typer + Rich) are planned, not verified via imports.

## Planned Architecture (from CLAUDE.md)

Five packages planned under `packages/`:
- **core/** — Domain models, LLM extraction, consolidation, search, ontology. Zero framework dependencies.
- **connectors/** — Source connectors (Slack, GitHub, Linear, webhook). Implements interfaces from core.
- **cli/** — CLI tool (planned: Typer + Rich). Depends on core.
- **api/** — REST API (planned: FastAPI) + MCP Server. Depends on core.
- **web/** — Web UI (future).

Data flow: Sources -> L0 Events -> Extraction -> L1 Entities + L2 Claims -> L3 Knowledge Tree -> CLI/MCP/API

## CI/CD

- [CI Pipeline](./.github/workflows/ci.yml): Lint (ruff), typecheck (pyright), test (pytest) — Python 3.13 via uv (50 LOC)
- [CodeQL](./.github/workflows/codeql.yml): Static analysis for Python, weekly schedule + push/PR (23 LOC)
- [Auto Label](./.github/workflows/auto-label.yml): Labels PRs by changed file paths (17 LOC)
- [Release Drafter](./.github/workflows/release-drafter.yml): Generates draft release notes from merged PRs (19 LOC)
- [Dependabot](./.github/dependabot.yml): Weekly updates for pip and github-actions ecosystems (15 LOC)

## Configuration

- [Labeler Rules](./.github/labeler.yml): Maps file paths to PR labels — core, api, cli, connectors, web, docs, ci, docker, tests (40 LOC)
- [Release Drafter Config](./.github/release-drafter.yml): Version resolver and changelog template (34 LOC)
- [Gitignore](./.gitignore): Python, IDE, env, Docker, Claude Code artifacts (45 LOC)

## Templates

- [PR Template](./.github/pull_request_template.md): Checklist for linting, tests, conventional commits (11 LOC)
- [Bug Report](./.github/ISSUE_TEMPLATE/bug_report.yml): Structured bug report form (38 LOC)
- [Feature Request](./.github/ISSUE_TEMPLATE/feature_request.yml): Feature suggestion form (21 LOC)

## Optional

- [Docs](./docs/): Extended documentation directory (planning docs are gitignored via `docs/superflow/`)
